examples: The attack on Charles was unjust.
The unjust Stamp Act must be annulled.
Those who are unjust in their manner of doing things lose the support of the people.
Americans generally recognize now that our nation's health care system has become excessively expensive, ineffective, and unjust.
Fiorentina said the punishment was "profoundly unjust" in a statement on its Web site.
